ddt:Target.Name: UPC 84 (v4.1)
ddt:Target.Description:
UPC X84
L. GERVAIS, 01349550779 laurent.gervais@renault.com
Soft 600 à 900 600 PPP3v1 700 PPP3v2, PSP 800 PSP,PS 900 PS,PP, série (0900, 2900, 2A00)

Item.Text: No front wiper constraint Fault present
No front wiper constraint Fault memorized
No front wiper blocking Fault present
No front wiper blocking Fault memorized

Data.Name: DTC_status
Data.Description:
Coding

  • b7: 0: standard value / 1: system value
  • b6: 0: not memorized failure / 1: memorized failure
  • b5: 0: failure not present / 1: failure present

Data.Name: FirstDTC
Data.Description: IGN relay means a problem on Bus Bar connection, low battery voltage, relay problem or reread problem.

Item.Text: NOT a default : bad WakeUp $920F ($07: no signal)
Fan Unit HS Driver failure $9210 ($03: Short circuitry to 12 Volts)
Reread HS Fan Unit driver OFF
Reread HS Fan Unit driver ON

Data.Name: para_IO_output
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Request.Name: Eng_ReadBitCalibration
Request.Comment: Read engineering front wiper inversion mode

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Write Setup - DF max period LSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF max period MSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF min period LSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF min period MSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - L rotor LSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - L rotor MSB - Melco 8GM

Device.Name: Fan Unit HS Driver failure $9210 ($03: Short circuitry to 12 Volts)
NOT a default : bad WakeUp $920F ($07: no signal)

Label.Text: Warning : For Melco (Mitsubihi) 8GM, only use automatic calibration

Send.RequestName: Write Setup - L rotor LSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF max period LSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF max period MSB - Melco 8GM
Write Setup - DF min period LSB - Melco 8GM

Write Setup - L rotor MSB - Melco 8GM
